question_text: Which of the following circuit symbols represents a fuse?

options.label: A
options.text: A circle with a cross inside it

options.label: B
options.text: A rectangle with a line through it

options.label: D
options.text: A circle with an arrow through it

explanation: A fuse is drawn as a rectangle with a diagonal line through it in circuit diagrams. The other symbols represent: a bulb (A), a capacitor (C), and an ammeter (D). This is a straightforward recall of standard circuit symbols taught in KS3.
